description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to a random enemy 3times, applies [Grievous Wound] 1 stack, and increases Physical DMG taken by 30% for 4sec.

For [7 sec->5sec], increases all allies’ ATK and Physical Evasion by [300->150], and grants self [Breath of Death] for 7sec. [Breath of Death]: Evades all Physical Attacks.. [(removed) Attack Speed increases by 30%, damage dealt to enemies increases by 25%]

Moves behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG, then consumes all [Grievous Wound] stacks on the target to deal additional Physical DMG per 1 stacks consumed. On Critical Hit, applies Bleed stacks 1 and resets the cooldown of [Slaughter]. Bleed : Deals 5% ATK Physical Damage over Time every 1sec for 15sec, and stacks up to 20 times.

Every 10sec, when a Normal Attack lands as a Critical Hit, deals Physical DMG 6 times. Each hit has a [50%->65%] chance to apply [Grievous Wound] stacks 1. [Grievous Wound] : Deals 15% ATK Physical Damage over Time every 1sec for 15sec, stacking up to 5 times. [(removed) Critical Rate increases by 300]

dark.unified: Increases Attack Speed of all allies by 10% for the duration. [(removed) Normal Attack damage increases by 115%]

light.unified: When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%. [(removed) Mana cost increases by 1000]

dark.unified: Roi’s Critical Rate increases by [(added) 360]. [(removed) On each hit, reduces the target's Mana by 150]
On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by [300%->24%] and Critical Damage by [60%->48%] for 5 sec. This effect can only be triggered once every 5 sec.
